name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEAT]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Summary
> One sentence: what should this feature do?

## Motivation
> What problem does it solve, or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed behavior
> How should it work? New API fields, new stream events, changes to the LLM/WFC phases, etc.
